commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

fix: prevent stale webview cache in Tauri desktop app

Add Cache-Control: no-store headers for page responses to prevent
WKWebView from caching HTML that references old chunk hashes. Keep
immutable caching for static chunks. Also clear WebKit cache directories
on startup as a safety net.

commit.message:
Fix TMI PER en sortie capital + frais souscription SCPI sur réinvestissement

1. PER sortie capital : la TMI retraite incluait une rente PER fictive même
   en mode croquerCapital, gonflant la TMI (ex: 30% au lieu de 11%).
   Fix : rentePerBruteEstimee = 0 quand croquerCapital = true.

2. SCPI : les distributions réinvesties composaient à 4.5% sans friction.
   En réalité, réinvestir en SCPI coûte ~10% de frais de souscription.
   Fix : rendementScpiEffectif = rendementScpi × (1 − partDistrib × frais),
   soit ~4.1% au lieu de 4.5% (~0.4 pt/an de surestimation corrigée).

3. Documenté la limitation connue du drawdown par annuité fixe vs simulation
   avec rendements distincts par enveloppe (nécessiterait une bisection).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ingest): retry reset when desktop still linked after startup

Initial reset call fails silently when Signal Desktop container isn't
reachable yet. Desktop then comes up still linked from previous session,
and the QR poll loop waits 120s for an unlink that never happens.

commit.message:
Fix image variant proxy lookup to match DB keys with original extension

The variantKey() function strips the original extension (.jpg) before
adding __variant.webp, so the proxy's base key extraction produced a
key without extension that didn't match the DB. Use LIKE for variants.

refactor(db): squash 57 migrations into single Init migration

Replace 57 incremental migrations with one squashed Init migration
generated from entity synchronization against a fresh PostgreSQL.

This fixes the CI E2E test failures caused by enum/index duplication
when migrations ran sequentially on a clean database.

Changes:
- Delete 57 old migration files
- Add 1700000000000-Init.ts (full schema: 280 types, 221 tables,
  744 indexes, 196 FKs)
- Fix 7 duplicate @Index() decorators across 4 entity files
  (class-level + property-level on same column)
- Railway typeorm_migrations table updated to reference new Init

commit.message:
Enforce auth ACL on tunnel channels

Previously, authfile ACL restrictions were only checked during the
initial config handshake. This adds ACL enforcement at the tunnel
layer when processing SSH channel requests, ensuring that each
outbound connection is validated against the user's allowed addresses.

commit.message:
Sticky hover lock: left/right scrubs time, up/down switches sectors

Hover locks onto the nearest sector line. Moving left/right stays on
the same line (scrubs time). Only significant vertical movement (>8px)
switches to the nearest sector. Prevents accidental sector switching.

commit.message:
Initial commit: Quantum Multiple Kernel Learning for Financial Classification

Full QMKL pipeline based on IBM/HSBC (2023), ICASSP 2024, and MLPRAE 2025:
- Preprocessing: StandardScaler + PCA + MinMaxScaler [0,2]
- 12 quantum feature maps (Z, ZZ, Pauli variants) with multiple bandwidths
- Fidelity & Projected quantum kernels via Qiskit 1.x
- MKL combination: Average, SDP, Centered Alignment, Projection, Bayesian Opt
- QSVM with precomputed kernel (sklearn)
- Statistical analysis: 20-run evaluation, bootstrap CI, t-test, Wilcoxon
- Ablation studies: n_qubits, bandwidth alpha, n_kernels, kernel type
- 5 Jupyter notebooks + CLI script

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

gfx: replace width/height with rc_vec2i size in rc_texture_desc

Mirrors the same change made to rc_image. The internal tex_entry_ table
struct is updated in kind, and all glTexImage2D / glTexSubImage2D call
sites use .size.x / .size.y. The texture desc init in test_app.c assigns
.size = owl->image.size directly (both are rc_vec2i).

feat(telegram): add threaded reply matching for multi-question flows

pollForReply now tracks the sent message_id and uses reply_to_message

pending question.
